warnings.message: No corpus scope is recorded. Claim-bearing outputs must be bounded to the loaded documents only.

corpus_scope_adequacy.note: Deterministic corpus-scope record accounting only; this does not validate sampling-frame adequacy, population generalization, methodological validity, or SOTA evidence.

claim_anchor_coverage.note: Structural source-anchor accounting for INV-9 claim-ledger entries only; anchor presence is not claim truth, human adjudication, full disconfirmation coverage, methodological validity, or SOTA evidence.

application_validity_d3.reason: No D3 application gold annotations found at ProjectState.config.extra['application_gold']; scoring requires human/adjudicated code-to-source assignments.
application_validity_d3.note: D3 is gold-dependent; absence of this section is not evidence of application validity.

codebook_quality_d4.reason: No codebook-quality rubric outcomes found at ProjectState.config.extra['codebook_quality_evaluations']; scoring requires externally supplied LLM-judge or expert rubric outcomes.
codebook_quality_d4.note: Absence of D4 rubric data is not evidence of codebook quality; blind expert-panel and LLM-judge evaluations are separate from ordinary Phase 0 scoring.

disconfirmation_d7.reason: No D7 disconfirmation gold annotations found at ProjectState.config.extra['disconfirmation_gold']; scoring requires human/adjudicated contrary-evidence anchors.
disconfirmation_d7.note: D7 is gold-dependent; absence of this section is not evidence of disconfirmation quality.

gt_fidelity_d8.reason: No GT-fidelity rubric outcomes found at ProjectState.config.extra['gt_fidelity_evaluations']; scoring requires externally supplied expert or judge rubric outcomes.
gt_fidelity_d8.note: Absence of D8 rubric data is not evidence of grounded-theory fidelity, methodological saturation, or full grounded theory.

interpretive_preference_d9.reason: No interpretive-preference outcomes found at ProjectState.config.extra['interpretive_preference_evaluations']; scoring requires externally supplied blind forced-choice outcomes.
interpretive_preference_d9.note: Absence of D9 preference data is not evidence of interpretive-depth parity; blind expert preference evaluation is separate from ordinary Phase 0 scoring.

category_saturation.note: Category saturation diagnostic unavailable because the codebook has no categories. This is not proof of grounded-theory saturation.

prompt_injection_inv7.note: Scores externally supplied prompt-injection fixture outcomes. This is a measurement substrate, not a proof of prompt-injection robustness.

bias_counterfactual_d6.reason: No bias counterfactual outcomes found at ProjectState.config.extra['bias_counterfactual_evaluations']; scoring requires externally supplied identity-cue swap outcomes.
bias_counterfactual_d6.note: Absence of D6 counterfactual data is not evidence that coding is unbiased; stratified and counterfactual bias audits are separate from ordinary Phase 0 scoring.

bias_stratified_d6.reason: No bias stratified outcomes found at ProjectState.config.extra['bias_stratified_evaluations']; scoring requires externally supplied correctness rows grouped by respondent attribute.
bias_stratified_d6.note: Absence of D6 stratified data is not evidence that coding is unbiased; stratified and counterfactual bias audits are separate from ordinary Phase 0 scoring.

confidence_calibration.reason: No confidence-calibration records found at ProjectState.config.extra['confidence_calibration_evaluations']; scoring requires externally supplied correctness labels.
confidence_calibration.note: Absence of calibration records is not evidence that confidence values are calibrated; confidence remains an ordinal self-report until scored against held-out correctness labels.

_meta.claims: capability only — not a SOTA/parity claim (needs gold + baselines; see EVALUATION_HARNESS.md §7)
_meta.coverage_note: traversal coverage only (segments with anchored evidence); examined-and-judged coverage is NOT available — re-run with `--exhaustive` for per-segment decisions (INV-8)
_meta.cost_note: D10 cost/latency is populated by the bench CLI from llm_client observability rows; never estimate it from ProjectState.

prompt_hashes.reason: Phase 0 does not execute prompt templates or live model calls; full prompt/model hashes belong to the future prompt_eval-backed suite.

wall_clock_d10.reason: No ProjectState.config.extra['run_timing'] metadata found; run the project through `project run` to record wall-clock timing.
wall_clock_d10.note: D10 wall-clock runtime requires recorded project-run metadata; do not estimate it from stage timestamps or summed LLM-call latency.

cost_latency_d10.reason: No llm_calls rows matched the project and trace selector.
cost_latency_d10.note: No D10 score is reported without matching real observability rows; do not estimate from ProjectState.
